title: Introduction to AI Systems
builds_on: M1 - computational thinking and specification writing
scope: History, LLMs, the 2026 AI stack, temperature, ethics/safety, EU AI Act, NIST RMF, White House EO.

assessments.title: Computational Thinking & AI Foundations
assessments.outcome: The learner can decompose a problem, write testable specifications, and describe and evaluate what an AI system can and cannot do.

assessments.title: AI Systems & Governance Essay
assessments.outcome: The learner can reason critically about AI risk and accountability and map a use case to the relevant governance framework.
